[[File:Staff of balance detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''staff of balance''' is a one-handed [[bladed staff]] which requires 75 [[Attack]] and 75 [[Magic]] to wield. It is created by bringing a [[Guthixian icon]] and a [[staff of the dead]] to [[Juna]] in the [[Chasm of Tears]]. This process is '''irreversible'''.

The staff of balance inherits '''all''' of the staff of the dead's effects. The only differences between them is that the staff of balance [[autocast]]s the [[Claws of Guthix]] god spell rather than the [[Flames of Zamorak]] god spell, and is '''unable''' to autocast [[Arceuus_spellbook#Combat_spells|Arceuus combat spells]]. In addition, it counts as a Zamorakian item while in the [[God Wars Dungeon]] and in the [[Bandit Camp (Kharidian Desert)|Desert Bandit Camp]].

The staff of balance '''cannot''' be upgraded with a [[magic fang]] to provide the additional magic attack bonus and toxic effect given to the [[toxic staff of the dead]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Power of Balance.gif|thumb|170px|A player using the staff of balance's special attack, ''Power of Death''.]]
The staff has a [[special attack]], ''Power of Death'', that halves all of the opponent's [[melee]] damage, consuming 100% of the player's special attack energy. Upon activating the special attack, a message will appear in the player's chatbox: {{mes|Spirits of deceased evildoers offer you their protection.|color=green}}

The effect lasts for one minute after using the special attack, but will instantly end if the player takes damage while the staff is not equipped. In addition, the effect stacks with the PvP damage reduction effect of the [[Protect from Melee]] [[prayer]]. The effect '''does not''' stack with itself should the player manage to cast the effect more than once before the initial cast expires.

The special attack '''cannot''' be used in legacy duels within the [[Emir's Arena]] if magic is disabled.

This special attack is also shared with the [[staff of the dead]], [[staff of light]], and [[toxic staff of the dead]].
